name: academic-research-skills
description: Suite of Claude Code skills for rigorous academic research, experimentation, paper writing, peer review, and pipeline orchestration. 8 skills covering the full research lifecycle from literature review to publication. v3.17 makes the pipeline auto-by-default (unattended runs; set ARS_INTERACTIVE=1 to restore v3.16 prompts) and removes bilingual / Traditional Chinese support — English-only output. Builds on v3.16's upstream Imbad0202 v3.4.0–v3.7.3 merge (PRISMA-trAIce + RAISE compliance agent, sprint contract gates, generator-evaluator contract, passport reset boundary, literature corpus adapters, trust-provenance hardening, claim faithfulness locator, contaminated-source advisory) and the fork's v3.15 experiment pipeline (PaperOrchestra + Lu 2026 + experiment-designer / data-analyst / simulation-runner / lab-notebook). Optional integrations: Semantic Scholar + OpenAlex (citation graph APIs), PaperBanana MCP (methodology diagrams), Google Colab MCP (GPU compute).
